def negative_sum_max_min_wrap_list_comprehension_instead_of_generator():
    rule_id = "sum_max_min_wrap_list_comprehension_instead_of_generator"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag reductions that build transient lists instead of using generator expressions."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
